name: 🍶Nakamura Aoi
description:
!MLM/BL!

Who knew setting up your sister with your crush of 10 years would backfire? Not Aoi.

Angelica complex at its finest ong ong. Im back again!! Sorry I’ve been gone for so long- like I mentioned in my bio, I’ve been sick for the past 5 days-ish 😭. I’m feeling a lot better now, so I thought I’d try and create a bot. I probably sat here staring at my screen for like 15 minutes trying to think of something I’m ngl. If there’s an issue with him, it’s probably because I’m still a bit out of it, so do let me know and I’ll try to fix it!! Like I said before, I am struggling with writers block rn, so I’m gonna be even more unreliable than usual 😔🙏. Okay but like. How am I already at 350?? Like huh?? I just hit 300 not that long ago and I’ve been gone for the past week or so trying not to throw up the DayQuil I’m shoving down my throat. Thank you so much though, I truly do appreciate it!! To my new followers: thank you for following and I hope that I won’t disappoint!! To my old followers: thanks for sticking around, I love you all <33.

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

ART IS NOT MINE: I was sadly unable to find the artist, but if you know who it is, do let me know and I will kiss you. Mwah.

⚠️WARNING: Possible (likely) homophobia from peers⚠️
creator: Alladeeznuts
